methods.method_name: Pollen Grain Fixation and Radioautograph Preparation
methods.description: This method describes the process of fixing pollen grains and preparing radioautographs for analysis. It involves using ethanol:acetic acid for fixation and Kodak NTB2 or NTB3 emulsion for radioautograph preparation.

steps.description: Freshly prepared, ice-cold ethanol: acetic acid (3:1 by volume) was used to fix the pollen grains.
steps.searchable_summary: fix pollen grains using ethanol:acetic acid solution

steps.description: Radioautographs were prepared by dipping air-dried Feulgen squashes of pollen grains in Kodak NTB2 liquid emulsion.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare radioautographs by dipping in Kodak NTB2 emulsion

steps.description: Radioautographs were prepared by applying thin air-dried loops of Kodak NTB2 or NTB3 emulsion onto air-dried, unstained pollen grains on slides.
steps.searchable_summary: apply Kodak NTB2 or NTB3 emulsion loops to pollen grains

steps.description: Exposure of the radioautographs took place in the presence of Drierite; development was done at 18°C for 2 min in Dektol, followed by a 30 sec water rinse and by fixation for 3 min in acid-fixer.
steps.searchable_summary: develop radioautographs using Dektol and acid-fixer

steps.description: Washing after fixation was limited to 10 min, since prolonged washing produced air bubbles in the emulsions.
All radioautographs were air-dried and then mounted in Euparal before examination.

methods.method_name: Chromatographic Analysis of Labeled Pollen Grains
methods.description: This method involves the extraction and chromatographic analysis of labeled pollen grains to study nucleosides and nucleotides.

steps.description: Cold 5% trichloroacetic acid extracts of labeled pollen grains were washed three times with ice-cold ether to remove trichloroacetic acid.
steps.searchable_summary: wash trichloroacetic acid extracts with ice-cold ether

steps.description: The extracts were then lyophilized, dissolved in minimum volumes of water, and spotted on No. 1 or No. 4 Whatman filter paper together with the appropriate nonradioactive markers.
steps.searchable_summary: lyophilize and spot extracts on Whatman filter paper

steps.description: Ascending development was carried out with one of three solvent systems.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ascending development with solvent systems
